creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
I got it to hang off the bat on my 8-core box, building talloc. It's
getting hung up trying to lock a semaphore:

#0  0x000000080102683c in _umtx_op () from /lib/libc.so.7
#1  0x00000008010170fe in sem_timedwait () from /lib/libc.so.7
#2  0x00000000004adaa8 in PyThread_acquire_lock ()
#3  0x00000000004b04f0 in lock_PyThread_acquire_lock ()
#4  0x00000000004836c9 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#5  0x00000000004854a0 in PyEval_EvalCodeEx ()
#6  0x00000000004839d1 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#7  0x00000000004854a0 in PyEval_EvalCodeEx ()
#8  0x00000000004839d1 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#9  0x0000000000484763 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#10 0x0000000000484763 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#11 0x0000000000484763 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#12 0x0000000000484763 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#13 0x00000000004854a0 in PyEval_EvalCodeEx ()
#14 0x00000000004d4a49 in function_call ()
#15 0x0000000000418c2d in PyObject_Call ()
#16 0x00000000004816af in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#17 0x00000000004854a0 in PyEval_EvalCodeEx ()
#18 0x00000000004839d1 in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()
#19 0x00000000004854a0 in PyEval_EvalCodeEx ()
#20 0x00000000004d4a49 in function_call ()
#21 0x0000000000418c2d in PyObject_Call ()
#22 0x00000000004816af in PyEval_EvalFrameEx ()

Thanks,
-Garrett
